result.stdout:
Abel - Opinionated C++ build runner

Usage:
  abel <command> [args...] [options]

Commands:
  build      Build one or more project directories
  run        Build then run executable projects
  test       Build then run tests with ctest
  check      Run clang-tidy on C/C++ source files in a project
  doctor     Check required tools on PATH
  list       List known registry packages
  search     Search registry packages
  info       Show detailed package metadata
  init       Create a new Abel project from a template
  add        Add dependency entries to project.json
  module     Create a local module and add it as dependency
  format     Format C/C++ source files in a project
  help       Show this help
  version    Show tool version

Options:
  -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output
  --release       Use Release configuration
  --debug         Use Debug configuration
  -c, --configuration <name>   Build config: Debug|Release|RelWithDebInfo|MinSizeRel
                 Default: project.json build.default_configuration, else Debug

Path behavior:
  - If no paths are provided, current directory is used if it contains project.json.
  - If a provided directory has no project.json, Abel scans immediate child directories.
  - You can also pass a direct path to project.json.

Registry examples:
  - abel list
  - abel search sdl
  - abel info imgui
  - abel info imgui/sdl3_renderer

Init examples:
  - abel init my_app
  - abel init my_module --type module
  - abel init --list-templates

Add examples:
  - abel add sdl3
  - abel add imgui/sdl3_renderer flecs
  - abel add --project ./Game sdl3_image

Module examples:
  - abel module gameplay
  - abel module ai --project ./Game/gameplay
  - abel module ui --dir modules/ui
  - abel module gameplay --partition ecs --partition systems.pathing

Abel - Opinionated C++ build runner

Usage:
  abel <command> [args...] [options]

Commands:
  build      Build one or more project directories
  run        Build then run executable projects
  test       Build then run tests with ctest
  check      Run clang-tidy on C/C++ source files in a project
  doctor     Check required tools on PATH
  list       List known registry packages
  search     Search registry packages
  info       Show detailed package metadata
  init       Create a new Abel project from a template
  add        Add dependency entries to project.json
  module     Create a local module and add it as dependency
  format     Format C/C++ source files in a project
  help       Show this help
  version    Show tool version

Options:
  -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output
  --release       Use Release configuration
  --debug         Use Debug configuration
  -c, --configuration <name>   Build config: Debug|Release|RelWithDebInfo|MinSizeRel
                 Default: project.json build.default_configuration, else Debug

Path behavior:
  - If no paths are provided, current directory is used if it contains project.json.
  - If a provided directory has no project.json, Abel scans immediate child directories.
  - You can also pass a direct path to project.json.

Registry examples:
  - abel list
  - abel search sdl
  - abel info imgui
  - abel info imgui/sdl3_renderer

Init examples:
  - abel init my_app
  - abel init my_module --type module
  - abel init --list-templates

Add examples:
  - abel add sdl3
  - abel add imgui/sdl3_renderer flecs
  - abel add --project ./Game sdl3_image

Module examples:

  - abel module ui --dir modules/ui

Usage:

  --debug         Use Debug configuration

Path behavior:

  - If a provided directory has no project.json, Abel scans immediate child directories.
